title: Falcon  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Custom Button screen shows "Other Providers" greyed out with message when Microsoft Teams is connected via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected.
3. Open the Microsoft Teams app and establish a connection (sign in and connect to a meeting or enable Teams integration).
4. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
6. Tap on 'Custom Button' in the Device Settings menu.
7. Observe the options displayed on the Custom Button screen.
expected: The Custom Button screen shows two options: "Microsoft Teams" (selected by default) and "Other Providers" (greyed out and inaccessible). A message is displayed: "Microsoft Teams is connected. Other Providers is not available when Microsoft Teams is connected."
